failure_reason: CUDA failed with error out of memory
vram_measurement_note: Original run used PyTorch CUDA counters, which do not capture CTranslate2 allocations. During EP674 large-v3-turbo full transcription, a manual nvidia-smi spot check showed about 3454 MiB used out of 4096 MiB, but this is not a reliable peak measurement and may include other GPU workloads.
